steps.title: Use the vertex formula
steps.content:
For a quadratic $y=ax^2+bx+c$, the maximum or minimum occurs at
$$
x=-\frac{b}{2a}
$$
Here, $a=-100$ and $b=1{,}400$.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the revenue equation and read the $x$-coordinate of the vertex. The answer is B.
